title: Zero In Outdoor Fly Trap - Ready-Baited Outdoor Fly Catcher, Multi Pack X2 - Non-Toxic, Insect Trap to Attract & Trap Bugs - Suitable for Garden & Outdoor Use, Lasts up to 2-3 Weeks
bullet_points: OUTDOOR FLY TRAP – Keep your garden fly-free with the Zero In Fly Catcher. These reusable fly traps feature a unique 4-way entry cap, attracting flies from up to a 10-metre radius. Our garden fly traps ensure rapid catch rates and effective outdoor fly control for a fly-free environment

NON-TOXIC PROTECTION – Experience peace of mind with our non-hazardous outdoor fly killer. These refillable traps catch up to 20,000 flies per setting, ensuring a fly-free zone. Ideal outdoor fly catchers for bin areas, kennels and chicken runs. Hang out of reach of children and pets

MULTI PACK VALUE – Double your protection with our two twin packs of outdoor fly deterrents featuring four effective traps. Each trap offers 2-3 weeks of coverage, ensuring exceptional value and long-term relief from flies. Keep your outdoor areas fly-free all summer long with ease and convenience

EASY TO USE – Empty the enclosed bait into the trap and add 300ml of water. Hang the fly trap where it gets the most sunlight and least wind. Two bait sachets are included per twin pack. Refill bait available (STV337, sold separately). Bury contents or dispose of in a plastic bag with household refuse

CARING FOR PEOPLE & THE PLANET – Zero In protects your health and home against Home Pest problems with minimal environmental impact. Zero In products are ethical and welfare-friendly solutions to everyday Home Pest problems that safeguard your well-being. We care for you, your family, and the planet
